title: Xaero's Map Frame
description: Replaces the Xaero's Map frame with a map texture! Makes it feel *slightly* more Vanilla!
body:
# Xaero's Map Frame
Give your Xaero's Minimap a slap of Vanilla-like goodness!

Compatible with Square and Circle frames (Although some sizes of the Circle look strange! Here be dragons!)

As far as I know, this should work with any version of Xaero's Minimap. There are two editions: Frilled and Hard. This refers to the interior edge where the frame touches the map itself. Pick whichever you prefer!

### Requires Xaero's Minimap (Hopefully that is obvious...)
![Comparison between the two editions of the map.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0b6f7c8c9bca0ac3609aeb2b85583671746e77.png)
